ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients.text: Contains less than two percent of Leavening

ingredients_text: Sweet potatoes 90%, Vegetable oil 6% (Sunflower, Canola or Soybean)*, Batter 4% (Potato Starch, Corn Starch, Potato Dextrin, Salt, Contains less than two percent of Leavening (Sodium Acid Pyrophosphate, Sodium Bicarbonate), Extractive of Paprika (color))
